articles.title: Sangakkara and Mahanama part of Transformation Committee to run SLC
articles.description: The majority of the committee's members hail from corporate, legal, and political spheres, with former Member of Parliament Eran Wickramaratne appointed as chair

articles.title: Queensland join NSW in rejecting BBL privatisation, CA considers alternatives
articles.description: CA chief executive Todd Greenberg says CA will look at alternative models and explained "it's difficult" with no consensus among the six states

articles.title: Shakib on Bangladesh's T20 World Cup pull-out: 'A blunder from the government side'
articles.description: "It was a great miss as far as Bangladesh cricket is concerned"

articles.title: Second T20I between Bangladesh and NZ abandoned due to rain and thunderstorms
articles.description: The umpires called off the game in Chattogram an hour before the official cut-off time

articles.title: Devine and Tahuhu announce international sign-off after T20 World Cup
articles.description: Nensi Patel, Izzy Sharp, Bree Illing, Flora Devonshire and Polly Inglis will play their first T20 World Cups

articles.title: SLC president Shammi Silva, executive committee members resign
articles.description: The Sri Lankan government is now likely to appoint an interim committee, which is expected to have former cricketers Sidath Wettimuny and Roshan Mahanama in it

articles.title: Babar and Hardie power Peshawar Zalmi into the PSL final
articles.description: Babar's big-hitting in the death overs took Zalmi to 221, and their bowlers sealed a dominant 70-run win

articles.title: Former quick Geoff Allott named New Zealand Cricket chief executive
articles.description: Allott played 10 Tests and 31 ODIs for New Zealand but has also served as NZC's general manager of cricket and an NZC board director, taking over after the resignation of Scott Weenink

articles.title: Former Zimbabwe captain Mary-Anne Musonda retires from all forms of cricket
articles.description: She was part of the Zimbabwe setup since 2006 and was appointed captain in 2018

articles.title: Tanzid Hasan, Amite Hasan earn maiden call-ups to Bangladesh Test squad
articles.description: Bangladesh have also recalled Taskin Ahmed, while Khaled Ahmed and Jaker Ali are notable omissions

articles.title: BCCI punishes Riyan Parag in vape incident, charged with penalty and demerit point
articles.description: BCCI is also exploring other options to initiate proceedings for stringent action against the erring team, its officials and player(s) to ensure that the reputation of the IPL remains intact.

articles.title: 'They’ll have a fruitful discussion' - Shakib Al Hasan confident of India-Bangladesh cricket resumption
articles.description: The senior cricketer, who is also a former member of the Bangladeshi parliament, expects that the arrival of new and fresh governance will help get things back on track.

articles.title: Leicestershire sign Nick Kelly on a multi-format contract for 2026 season
articles.description: Kelly will join Leicestershire’s squad for all three formats of the game and is seen as a potential replacement for long-serving overseas player Peter Handscomb.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: 'It is such a privilege' - Tilly Corteen-Coleman overjoyed to form part of England squad
articles.description: The 18-year-old is yet to make her international debut, but forms part of not only the T20 World Cup squad but also the ODI series against New Zealand before the showpiece tournament.
